title: Software Update - DFU - Perform DFU with no internet [New]
scenario: DFU with no internet connection shows "Feature unavailable" dialog in Device Settings > Software Update
steps: 1. Pair the headset with the mobile device and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with Wi-Fi turned off.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update.
4. Turn on Wi-Fi on the mobile device and tap the Update button again.
6. Turn off Wi-Fi on the mobile device and tap Continue.
expected: 1. With Wi-Fi off, tapping Update shows a "Feature unavailable" dialog. 2. With Wi-Fi on, tapping Update shows the 3-step DFU screens. 3. With Wi-Fi turned off again and tapping Continue, the "Feature unavailable" dialog appears again.
